mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.subject_id, p.question, p.answer, p.explanation, p.type, p.difficulty, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, p.is_ai_generated, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM problem p ORDER BY p.id

SELECT p.id, p.subject_id, p.question, p.answer, p.explanation, p.type, p.difficulty, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, p.is_ai_generated, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM problem p WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.subject_id, p.question, p.answer, p.explanation, p.type, p.difficulty, p.option1, p.option2, p.option3, p.option4, p.option5, p.is_ai_generated, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM problem p WHERE p.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY p.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem (subject_id, question, answer, explanation, type, difficulty, option1, option2, option3, option4, option5, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{explanation}, #{type}, #{difficulty}, #{option1}, #{option2}, #{option3}, #{option4}, #{option5}, #{isAiGenerated}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE problem SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, explanation = #{explanation}, type = #{type}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, option1 = #{option1}, option2 = #{option2}, option3 = #{option3}, option4 = #{option4}, option5 = #{option5}, is_ai_generated = #{isAiGenerated}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
